moments.title: World Cup 2026: England draw, Scotland lose
moments.blurb: England were held to a 0-0 draw by Ghana, while Scotland suffered a 3-0 defeat to Brazil in their latest FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage matches yesterday.

angles.name: England performance
angles.copy: England's World Cup momentum stalled with a goalless draw against Ghana yesterday. What went wrong for the Three Lions?

angles.name: Scotland's struggle
angles.copy: Tough night for Scotland at the World Cup, falling 3-0 to Brazil. Are their knockout hopes hanging by a thread?

angles.name: Group stage drama
angles.copy: More World Cup drama unfolded yesterday with England drawing and Scotland facing a heavy defeat. Who impressed you most?

moments.title: World Cup 2026: Today's key matches
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage continues today with Ecuador vs Germany (BBC One, 9pm KO) and Curaçao vs Ivory Coast (BBC Two, 9pm KO) among the fixtures.

angles.name: Evening kick-offs
angles.copy: Tonight's World Cup action: Ecuador v Germany kicks off at 9pm on BBC One. Where are you watching from?

angles.name: Who to watch
angles.copy: Germany in action tonight at the World Cup! Can they secure a crucial win against Ecuador? Catch it on BBC One.

angles.name: Later games
angles.copy: More World Cup action tonight with Curaçao v Ivory Coast on BBC Two. What's your prediction for this one?

moments.title: Wimbledon qualifying concludes, main draw tomorrow
moments.blurb: The qualifying rounds for Wimbledon 2026 conclude today, with the official main draw for the Championships set to take place tomorrow, June 26.

angles.name: Qualifying wrap-up
angles.copy: Wimbledon qualifying wraps up today! Who are you hoping makes it through to the main draw?

angles.name: Draw anticipation
angles.copy: The excitement builds for Wimbledon! The official draw for the main tournament is tomorrow. Who do you want to see play whom?

moments.title: UK heatwave peaks with thunderstorm risk
moments.blurb: The UK heatwave continues today with temperatures in England and Wales potentially reaching 35-40°C, before easing from Friday with a risk of thunderstorms.

angles.name: Extreme heat continues
angles.copy: Another scorcher today! Temperatures could hit 40°C in parts of England and Wales. Stay hydrated and stay safe out there! #HeatwaveUK

angles.name: Thunderstorm warning
angles.copy: Heads up! As the heatwave eases from tomorrow, there's an increasing risk of thunderstorms, especially across southern and southwestern UK. Prepare for some wild weather!

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13 in full swing
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, is currently airing nightly at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, having started on June 1st.

angles.name: Villa drama
angles.copy: Still hooked on Love Island UK? The drama is heating up nightly at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX. Who's your favourite couple (or love triangle)?

angles.name: World Cup crossover
angles.copy: Love Island meets the World Cup! This season has a football theme. Are you rooting for a specific Islander to 'score'?

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 streaming now
moments.blurb: Jeremy Clarkson's popular series 'Clarkson's Farm' returned for its fifth season on Prime Video on June 3rd, continuing the adventures at Diddly Squat Farm.

angles.name: Back to the farm
angles.copy: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 is here! Have you been binging the new episodes on Prime Video? What's the latest chaos at Diddly Squat?

angles.name: Kaleb's adventures
angles.copy: Kaleb's first trip abroad features in the new season of Clarkson's Farm! What's been your favourite moment so far?

moments.title: Swansea City 2026-27 fixtures released today
moments.blurb: Swansea City will discover their full 2026-27 Championship fixture list today, June 25, with the Carabao Cup first round draw also taking place at 4:30pm.

angles.name: Swans fixture day
angles.copy: It's THE day for Swansea City fans! The 2026-27 Championship fixtures drop at 12pm. Who are you hoping to play first?

angles.name: Carabao Cup draw
angles.copy: Exciting afternoon for Swansea City with the Carabao Cup draw at 4:30pm! What number are the Swans hoping for?

moments.title: Happy 70th to Chris Isaak
moments.blurb: American rockabilly and crooner icon Chris Isaak celebrates his 70th birthday tomorrow, June 26th.

angles.name: Wicked Game legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the smooth voice behind 'Wicked Game', Chris Isaak, turns 70! What's your favourite track from the legend?

angles.name: Happy 70th
angles.copy: Sending early birthday wishes to the incredible Chris Isaak, who celebrates his 70th tomorrow! His music is timeless.

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger turns 48
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and television personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for The Pussycat Dolls, celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29th.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll power
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 this Saturday. What's your top Pussycat Dolls hit?

angles.name: Pop icon birthday
angles.copy: From girl band sensation to solo star, Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th on Saturday. Throwback to your favourite 00s track!

moments.title: Men at Work's Colin Hay turns 73
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, the distinctive voice of Australian band Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday on June 29th.

angles.name: Land Down Under legend
angles.copy: He's the voice behind 'Down Under'! Colin Hay of Men at Work turns 73 this Saturday. What's your go-to Men at Work song?

angles.name: Acoustic icon
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday this Saturday to the brilliant Colin Hay! His solo work and Men at Work classics are truly iconic.

moments.title: Missy Elliott's 55th birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott will celebrate her 55th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Hip-Hop royalty
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! The legendary Missy Elliott turns 55 next Wednesday. What's your all-time favourite Missy track?

angles.name: A true innovator
angles.copy: Happy 55th to the trailblazing Missy Elliott next week! Her influence on music is undeniable. Which of her hits defined the 00s for you?

moments.title: Deborah Harry of Blondie turns 81
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman, Deborah Harry, will celebrate her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Punk rock queen
angles.copy: The one and only Deborah Harry turns 81 next Wednesday! What's your favourite Blondie classic?

angles.name: Ageless icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st to the truly iconic Deborah Harry next week! Still rocking after all these years. Call Me for a celebration!

moments.title: Synthesizer legend Vince Clarke turns 66
moments.blurb: Vince Clarke, co-founder of Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth-pop pioneer
angles.copy: A true synth-pop visionary! Vince Clarke of Erasure, Yazoo, and Depeche Mode turns 66 this Friday. What's your favourite track from his incredible career?

angles.name: Electronic music master
angles.copy: From 'Don't Go' to 'A Little Respect', Vince Clarke has crafted so many electronic masterpieces. Happy 66th to him this Friday!

moments.title: Happy 76th to Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, known for hits like 'The Power of Love', celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: The Power of Love
angles.copy: It's Hip to Be Square! The legendary Huey Lewis turns 76 this Sunday. What's your favourite Huey Lewis and the News song?

angles.name: 80s icon
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the brilliant Huey Lewis, who celebrates his 76th this Sunday! A true 80s icon.
